data.title: Whisper Transcription
data.notes: Transcribe one audio file into text, subtitles, and structured JSON using whisper.cpp with a model baked directly into the Docker image.

params.title: Whisper Model
params.value: Base [base], Tiny [tiny], Small [small], Medium [medium], Large v3 [large-v3]
params.caption: Choose which prebuilt Docker image variant to launch. Larger models are slower and need more memory, but generally improve accuracy.

params.title: Language
params.caption: Enter a spoken language code such as `en`, `es`, `fr`, etc. Use `auto` to let Whisper detect the language automatically.

params.title: Translate to English
params.caption: When enabled, Whisper translates the source speech into English instead of transcribing in the original language.

params.title: Threads
params.caption: Number of CPU threads to give whisper.cpp inside the container.

params.title: Initial Prompt
params.caption: Optional prompt text to steer transcription, for example names, jargon, acronyms, or expected vocabulary.

params.title: Attach Text File
params.caption: Attach the plain text transcript as a `.txt` file.

params.title: Attach LRC File
params.caption: Attach lyric-style subtitle output in `.lrc` format.

params.title: Attach JSON File
params.caption: Attach the raw JSON output emitted by whisper.cpp.
